findings.desc: Single-char quote input -> ArgumentOutOfRangeException (EC-1 & EC-2). Fix: add length<2 guard.
Unclosed opening quote at start silently discards all input content (Issue 2).
Adjacent quoted strings emit 2 tokens not 1 (Issue 4). Closing quote triggers yield+reset.

lean_formal_spec_plan.approach: structure ArgumentArity {min max : Int}; Int32.MaxValue=2147483647; use decide for concrete theorems

ci_notes.sha256_approach: download .sha256 from GitHub Releases dynamically (no hardcoded hash)
ci_notes.skip_guard: lean_count check gates all build steps
ci_notes.cache_strategy: cache restore BEFORE elan install; elan install and lake update gated on cache-hit != true
ci_notes.proof_summary: step summary reports theorem/lemma count and sorry-line count
